PublishApiEvent: Marks controller types or methods so that API response events are published asynchronously after execution via PublishApiEventAspect (for analytics/logging).
Positive: Marks an integration test method as a positive (happy-path) scenario; supports feature, testCase, expected, and failOnUnmatchedStub metadata.
Order: Controls the execution order of integration test methods via value (int), first, or last flags.
Negative: Marks an integration test method as a negative (error/unhappy) scenario; supports feature, testCase, expected, and failOnUnmatchedStub metadata.
Controller: Marks a test class as representing a controller in integration tests; specifies controller name (value), description, and failOnUnmatchedStub.
BaseScenario: Marks an integration test method as a base scenario with optional value(s), pathValues, and markAsDefault for test organization and reuse.
